summary: Full frontend regression sweep across all 7 pages of Shano's Skips after refactor. ALL tests passed with 0 unexpected console errors. Verified routes, nav, refactored HomePage composition, GHL iframe replacement on Contact, footer, and mobile responsive behaviour.
passed_tests: All 7 routes load without runtime errors (/, /skip-bin-sizes, /waste-guide, /delivery-area, /about, /faq, /contact) with correct page titles
Header navigation: every nav-link-* click routes to correct path
HomePage hero CTA: data-testid='hero-quote-btn' present, text='Get a Quote', href='/contact'
HomePage section ordering: bins-teaser-section (y=1166) appears VISUALLY ABOVE services-section (y=2200)
HomePage renders hero-image, 4 bin teaser cards (bin-teaser-2/3/4/6), 8 service cards, bins-teaser-section, services-section
Skip Bin Sizes page: 4 skip-bin images render and 3 'Get a Quote' /contact CTAs present
Waste Guide page: waste-allowed-list and waste-not-allowed-list both render
Delivery Area page: Google Maps iframe renders, no runtime errors
About Us page: loads correctly, no runtime errors (refactor import fix verified)
FAQ page: 6 accordion triggers detected, first item expands (aria-expanded=true)
Contact page: data-testid='ghl-contact-iframe' present with correct src starting 'https://link.simplifyyourbusiness.au/widget/form/zOI9pRb8CX8RmEcTTMzd'; contact-info-phone/email/facebook all render
Footer (data-testid='footer'), scroll-to-top-btn, footer-facebook-link render on all 7 pages
Mobile (375x812): mobile-menu-toggle opens mobile-menu, mobile-nav-link-skip-bin-sizes navigates correctly
0 console errors (excluding expected GHL Cloudflare 403 which were filtered)
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured after refactor. Section components in /components/sections/home/ and /sections/waste/ are cleanly composed in HomePage.js and WasteGuidePage.js.
Contact page correctly loads GHL form_embed.js once via useEffect with idempotent guard; iframe attributes are preserved exactly.
All data-testids preserved across the refactor — testability is intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression sweep clean. Backend was skipped per request (Contact form now uses GHL iframe, /api/contact endpoint no longer used by UI). GHL iframe content cannot be tested in headless due to Cloudflare 403 — only verify the iframe element + src attribute. All 7 routes, navigation, refactored sections, mobile menu, and footer verified working.
